name: Apple-Ginger Scones
recipeIngredient: 1 egg, or 2 egg whites, or 1/4 cup egg substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, mix Bisquick, chopped apple, brown sugar, and ginger until combined.
4. Add milk and egg (or egg substitute) to the mixture. Mix until a dough forms.
5. Knead the dough 10 times on a floured surface.
6. Place the dough onto the prepared cookie sheet. Pat it into an 8-inch wide circle.
7. Brush the top of the dough with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
8. Cut the scone into 8 wedges.
9. Bake for about 14 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Serve warm.
